vat_rates_by_country.label: EU VAT Rates by Member State 2025
vat_rates_by_country.notes: EU average fallback rate 21%. Standard/Reduced rates per member state: AT:20/10, BE:21/6, BG:20/9, CY:19/5, CZ:21/12, DE:19/7, DK:25/0, EE:22/9, ES:21/10, FI:25.5/14, FR:20/5.5, GR:24/13, HR:25/5, HU:27/18, IE:23/13.5, IT:22/10, LT:21/9, LU:17/8, LV:21/12, MT:18/7, NL:21/9, PL:23/8, PT:23/13, RO:19/9, SE:25/12, SI:22/9.5, SK:23/10. See country_rates for machine-readable dict.

vat_oss.label: EU VAT One Stop Shop (OSS) — B2C cross-border
vat_oss.notes: OSS regime (EU Directive 2021/904): B2C digital/goods supplies taxed at the destination country rate. Seller registers once in one EU member state and reports/remits VAT for all EU-wide B2C sales via OSS portal. flat_rate=0.21 is the EU average fallback; actual rate = destination country standard rate from country_rates dict. Threshold below which home-country rate applies: EUR 10,000/year aggregate.

vat_reverse_charge.label: EU VAT Reverse Charge — B2B cross-border
vat_reverse_charge.notes: B2B cross-border supplies within the EU: seller invoices at 0% VAT (flat_rate=0.0), buyer self-accounts for VAT in their own jurisdiction under the reverse charge mechanism. Art. 44 EU VAT Directive 2006/112/EC. Requires valid EU VAT number (VIES validation) of the buyer.
